problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Combining Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
